title: Thurrock Council: Explanatory Memorandum (17 July 2025)
body: "The Explanatory Memorandum to the Directions made under sections 15(5) and (6) of the Local Government Act 1999 on 17 July 2025 in respect of Thurrock Council. It summarises the circumstances in which the Secretary of State has made the Directions, her reasons for this exercise of her powers, and the implications of the Directions for this Authority.  This Memorandum was issued on 17 July 2025 to reflect the Directions to the Council following the extension of the statutory intervention. This replaces the previous Explanatory Memorandum as the Directions previously issued have been revoked. "
